[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: NEWSSargent Metal Fabricators expansion grand opening with Gov McMaster celebrates business growth in Anderson County Ken RuinardAnderson Independent MailFeb. 7, 2022, 5:11 p.m. ETSouth Carolina Gov Henry McMaster, left, accepts a metal fabricated art piece from President Tim Hayden after speaking inside the expanded area of Sargent Metal Fabricators, during the grand opening of the 80,000 square foot expansion off State Highway 24 in Anderson County Monday, February 7, 2022. [PUBLISHED DATE]: 2022-10-06
[TITLE]: Photos: President Joe Biden in Poughkeepsie – Daily Freeman
[METADATA/INTRO]: President Joe Biden looks at the IBM System One quantum computer with IBM Chairman and CEO Arvind Krishna pointing at the computer surrounded by officials, including New York Gov. Kathy Hochul during a tour of an IBM facility in Poughkeepsie,...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: President Joe Biden looks at the IBM System One quantum computer with IBM Chairman and CEO Arvind Krishna pointing at the computer surrounded by officials, including New York Gov. Kathy Hochul during a tour of an IBM facility in Poughkeepsie, N.Y., on Thursday Oct. 6, 2022. (Patricia R. Doxsey/Daily Freeman) 
 Gov. Kathy Hochul and U.S. Reps. Pat Ryan, far right, and Sean Patrick Maloney, to Ryan's left, stand together during a President Joe Biden tour of an IBM facility in Poughkeepsie, N.Y., on Thursday Oct. 6, 2022. (Patricia R. Doxsey/Daily Freeman) 
 An old IBM sign at the Poughkeepsie plant on Thursday, Oct. 6, 2022 (Patricia R. Doxsey/Daily Freeman)
